secondary_axis_weight_hints.reason: The function processes structured CSV data, requiring parsing and default handling, aligning with data (D) priority.

axis_weight_reason: Primary axis weights follow code_validation_and_utility priority: C (correctness) highest, then A (applicability), V (validation), D (documentation) lowest. Secondary axis weights follow structured_data_processing priority: D (data) highest, then C, V, A.
